title: Allow for summing of columns created with formula
excerpt:
Description
Currently can’t sum columns in which I have created the field using a formula. 
What are you trying to achieve
I want to be able to sum any column created, regardless if the field is a formula or not.

posts.author: JStanwick (Jaime Stanwick)
posts.cookedHtml:
